title: 宝塚記念の後に・それはあまりに眩しく

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Amid wild excitement, the curtain closes on the
Takarazuka Kinen, where Air Groove has
managed to snatch victory from Silence Suzuka.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, Air Groove is dazzled by Suzuka's
magnificent running, which sets her fans ablaze
with unparallelled excitement.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Worrying that she can't compare, Air Groove
finds herself in fear of Silence Suzuka.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her heart bruised and her composure rattled, Air
Groove puts on a brave face to focus on the
Sapporo Kinen ahead, but nonetheless leaves the
racecourse dejected.
